history.text:
[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: A close-up photo shows a person in the foreground covering part of their face with their hand while two other people stand behind them and take a similar picture.

Main Subject:
In the foreground, a person with short dark hair is shown from the chest up, facing the camera with their hand raised to cover the lower part of their face, partially obscuring their mouth and chin; their other hand is not clearly visible. Behind them, two other people are visible: one appears to wear a dark top and stands slightly left, and another stands to the right holding up a phone with the device aimed toward the scene.

Setting:
The scene appears outdoors with greenery and tall palm-like plants on the left side. In the background to the right, a hazy sky and a distant landscape or water-like area are visible. The lighting suggests daylight, with bright sky light causing a soft, overexposed look in the upper area of the image.

Visual Details:
The dominant colors are natural greens in the plants and light blue/gray tones in the distant background. The foreground person’s clothing appears to be a dark blue or gray shirt with a lighter trim or collar area. The image is framed tightly, with the camera at about face level for the foreground person, and the background is slightly out of focus; there is noticeable glare/brightness from the sky.

Visible Text:
No important visible text detected.

Practical Summary:
The image shows three people outdoors, photographed from close range. The front person covers their mouth with their hand, while the others are positioned behind and one holds up a phone to take a picture.

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
